description:
Verify the Onion-Location HTTP header upgrade path for the Tor Project website (https://www.torproject.org/). Navigate to the site's v3 onion service and create a bookmark titled 'Tor Project Onion'. Document the 'onion-location' HTTP response header value from the clearnet site in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/onion_location_audit.txt using the following format:

Target Site: https://www.torproject.org/
Header Detected: Yes
Onion-Location Value: <full onion URL>
